description: Minimum viable story set to get Attio CRM integration live in SalesBlock. Ordered: P0 stabilization first (prerequisite reliability), then CRM adapter infrastructure, then Attio-specific OAuth + adapter + sync. 17 stories total.

techStack.frontend: React 18 + TypeScript 5.3 + Vite 5.1 + TanStack Query v5 + Tailwind 3 + Shadcn/ui

strategicGuardrails: No CRM replacement — syncs WITH Attio, does not replace it
No set-and-forget automation — activity push is async best-effort, not transactional
No surveillance — only rep-initiated or rep-consented sync
OAuth pattern must match existing GmailOAuthButton / SalesforceOAuthButton exactly

userStories.title: Fix Pipeline drag StrictMode double-fire + optimistic rollback
userStories.description: As a user dragging deals on the pipeline kanban, I need the drag to execute exactly once and roll back on failure so deal stages don't get corrupted.
acceptanceCriteria: onDragEnd in Pipeline.tsx is guarded with useRef idempotency token
Deal stage update is optimistic with rollback on Supabase failure
In React StrictMode, drag fires only once regardless of double-invoke
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: @dnd-kit onDragEnd fires twice in StrictMode dev. Guard with useRef(false) idempotency flag reset on each drag start.

userStories.title: Fix BookMeetingModal silent failure on expired calendar token
userStories.description: As a user booking a meeting, I need to see an error and be prompted to reconnect if my calendar token has expired.
acceptanceCriteria: BookMeetingModal checks token expiry before attempting calendar API call
If token expired, shows 'Calendar disconnected — reconnect in Settings' message with link
If token refresh fails, same error message shown
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Currently fails silently — user thinks meeting was booked but it wasn't.

userStories.title: Fix ContactDetailPage crash on direct navigation
userStories.description: As a user navigating directly to a contact detail URL, the page should load without crashing.
acceptanceCriteria: ContactDetailPage fetches contact by ID from URL params if no history state
Back button falls back to /contacts list if no history
Loading state shown while fetching
404 shown if contact ID doesn't exist or isn't in user's org
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Currently crashes with undefined error when navigated to directly.

userStories.title: Add idempotency key to Stripe webhook handler
userStories.description: As an operator, I need Stripe webhooks to be processed exactly once so subscriptions aren't double-activated on retry.
acceptanceCriteria: Edge function stores processed event IDs in a stripe_webhook_events table
Before processing, checks if event_id already processed — skips if so
checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.updated, invoice.payment_failed all guarded
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Stripe retries webhooks on timeout. Create stripe_webhook_events(event_id PRIMARY KEY, processed_at) and check before processing.

userStories.title: Add ON CONFLICT guards to Salesforce sync and email reply tracker
userStories.description: As a user with Salesforce connected, I need activity sync and email reply tracking to handle retries without creating duplicate records.
acceptanceCriteria: sync-activities-to-salesforce edge function uses ON CONFLICT on salesforce_task_id
check-email-replies edge function uses ON CONFLICT on thread_id + reply timestamp
Retry of either function doesn't create duplicate activity/reply records
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Both edge functions insert records on retry without checking for duplicates.

userStories.title: Fix concurrent OAuth token refresh race condition
userStories.description: As a user with OAuth connections, I need simultaneous API calls that detect an expired token to coordinate so only one refresh occurs.
acceptanceCriteria: token-refresh.ts implements a mutex/queue pattern: first caller refreshes, others wait for the result
No duplicate refresh requests are sent to the OAuth provider
After refresh, all queued callers receive the new token
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: CRITICAL for Attio OAuth reliability. Multiple concurrent calls can race to refresh. Implement with a Promise queue: if refresh in-flight, push resolve callbacks and return shared promise.

userStories.title: Add pre-check for Salesforce push when disconnected
userStories.description: As a user, I need the Salesforce activity push to check connection status before attempting to sync.
acceptanceCriteria: Before pushing activity to Salesforce, check oauth_connections for active Salesforce connection
If disconnected, show toast: 'Salesforce not connected — connect in Settings to sync activities'
Auto-push toggle in Settings is disabled when Salesforce is disconnected
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Sets the pattern for all CRM disconnected-state handling including Attio.

userStories.title: Add confirmation dialogs to all delete actions
userStories.description: As a user, I need to confirm before deleting SalesBlocks, Scripts, Goals, and Email Templates.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete SalesBlock shows confirmation dialog with session title
Delete Call Script shows confirmation with script name
Delete Goal shows confirmation with metric name
Delete Email Template shows confirmation with template name
All dialogs have Cancel and Delete buttons, Cancel is default focus
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use existing shadcn/ui AlertDialog component — it's already in the project.

userStories.title: Wire ported analytics computation to Analytics page
userStories.description: As a user viewing Analytics, I need the ported analytics computation module connected to the Analytics page.
acceptanceCriteria: Analytics page imports from ported-features/08-analytics-computation/ or the code is moved to lib/analytics/
Sales metrics, distribution, and timeline computations use the ported module
Analytics page renders correct data with the new computation layer
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check if frontend/src/ported-features/08-analytics-computation/ exists. If not, skip and mark passes:true with a note.

userStories.title: Create CrmAdapter TypeScript interface
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a unified CRM adapter interface so all CRM integrations follow the same pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: New directory: frontend/src/lib/crm/
frontend/src/lib/crm/types.ts defines: CrmAdapter interface, CrmContact, CrmCompany, CrmDeal, CrmActivity, CrmImportOptions
CrmAdapter interface includes: connect(), disconnect(), isConnected(), importContacts(), pushActivity(), importDeals(), pushDeal()
All CRM entity types map cleanly to existing SalesBlock domain types (Contact, Deal, Activity)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Foundation story — nothing else can start until this exists. Keep it minimal: only what Attio actually needs.

userStories.title: Refactor Salesforce integration into CrmAdapter pattern
userStories.description: Refactor the existing Salesforce integration into the CrmAdapter pattern so it serves as the template for Attio.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/lib/salesforce.ts code moved to frontend/src/lib/crm/adapters/salesforce.ts
SalesforceAdapter class implements CrmAdapter interface
All existing Salesforce functionality preserved: OAuth, contact import, activity push
ImportSalesforceModal uses SalesforceAdapter instead of direct salesforce.ts imports
Settings page Salesforce section uses adapter
Zero regressions on existing Salesforce features
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Pure refactor — no new functionality. Read salesforce.ts thoroughly before moving anything. Keep the old file as a re-export barrel during transition.

userStories.title: Create CRM adapter registry
userStories.description: A registry that maps provider names to adapter instances so Settings > Integrations can dynamically render CRMs.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/lib/crm/registry.ts exports: registerAdapter(), getAdapter(), getAvailableAdapters()
Salesforce adapter auto-registered on import
Settings > Integrations page uses registry to render connected/available CRMs
Each adapter provides: displayName, iconUrl, description, scopes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Keep it simple: a Map<string, CrmAdapterFactory>. Salesforce registers itself on import.

userStories.title: Widen oauth_connections provider CHECK constraint
userStories.description: The oauth_connections table must support 'attio' as a provider to store Attio OAuth tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: New Supabase migration alters oauth_connections.provider CHECK constraint
Allowed values: gmail, outlook, google_calendar, outlook_calendar, salesforce, attio, hubspot, pipedrive, close
Migration is backwards-compatible (existing rows unaffected)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Simple ALTER TABLE. Check existing constraint name first with \d oauth_connections. Use ALTER TABLE ... DROP CONSTRAINT ... ADD CONSTRAINT pattern.

userStories.title: Build Attio OAuth connection flow
userStories.description: As a user, I need to connect my Attio account via OAuth in Settings so SalesBlock can sync with my Attio CRM.
acceptanceCriteria: AttioOAuthButton component in Settings > Integrations
OAuth 2.0 flow with Attio API: authorization URL, callback handler, token exchange
CSRF nonce validation on callback (following existing oauth-csrf.ts pattern)
Access token + refresh token stored in oauth_connections with provider='attio'
Connected state shown with Attio workspace name
Disconnect button removes oauth_connection row
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Copy GmailOAuthButton.tsx and SalesforceOAuthButton.tsx as templates. Attio OAuth docs: https://developers.attio.com/docs/oauth. Attio authorize URL: https://app.attio.com/authorize. Token URL: https://app.attio.com/oauth/token. Scopes needed: read:people, write:notes, read:companies, read:deals.

userStories.title: Build Attio CRM adapter
userStories.description: An Attio adapter implementing CrmAdapter so all Attio data operations go through the unified interface.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/lib/crm/adapters/attio.ts implements CrmAdapter interface
Maps Attio People → CrmContact (name, email, phone, company, title)
Maps Attio Companies → CrmCompany
Maps SalesBlock Activity → Attio Note format for push
Handles Attio API pagination (cursor-based, use page_token)
Handles rate limiting (Attio: 100 req/s — add 10ms delay between batch requests)
AttioAdapter registered in CRM registry
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Attio REST API base: https://api.attio.com/v2. People endpoint: GET /v2/objects/people/records. Companies: GET /v2/objects/companies/records. Notes: POST /v2/notes. Use Bearer token from oauth_connections. Reference: https://developers.attio.com/reference

userStories.title: Build Attio contact sync (import)
userStories.description: As a user with Attio connected, I need to import People records from Attio into SalesBlock contacts.
acceptanceCriteria: ImportAttioModal component: search/filter Attio People, preview field mapping, import selected
Import maps Attio fields to SalesBlock Contact fields
Duplicate detection by email before import
Imported contacts have source='attio' and attio_record_id stored
Contacts table migration adds attio_record_id column (nullable, unique per org)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Follow ImportSalesforceModal.tsx as template. Source enum: add 'attio' to contact source type in domain.ts.

userStories.title: Build Attio activity push
userStories.description: As a user with Attio connected, I need SalesBlock activities to automatically push to Attio as Notes on the People record.
acceptanceCriteria: After logging an activity in SalesBlock, if Attio is connected AND auto-push enabled, create a Note on the Attio People record
Note content: activity type, outcome, notes text, timestamp, rep name
Push is async (does not block activity logging UI)
Failed pushes retried once, then marked failed — error stored in activity.metadata
Auto-push toggle in Settings > Integrations > Attio
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Follow same async push pattern as Salesforce sync-activities-to-salesforce. Attio Notes API: POST /v2/notes with {parent_record_id, parent_object, title, content}. If contact has no attio_record_id, skip push silently.
